---
name: document
description: 'Generate comprehensive documentation for code, APIs, or features using mega-writer methodology.'
agent: agent
---

Generate comprehensive documentation for the specified code/feature:

1. **Audience**: Who will read this? (developers, users, ops)
2. **Structure**:
   - Overview (what and why)
   - Quick start (get running in 2 minutes)
   - API reference (if applicable)
   - Examples (real, working code)
   - Troubleshooting (common issues)
3. **Quality rules**:
   - All code examples must be runnable
   - No placeholder text ("lorem ipsum", "TODO")
   - Include error handling in examples
   - Link to related docs

Full methodology: `.claude/agents/mega/mega-writer.md`
